programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: An exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, live music performances, and the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: Love Amongst the Stars
programme.desc: Heidi, a professor of astronomy, is convinced that a rare planetary alignment is the key to getting an observatory for her students.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman. Four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: 9News Afternoon, live and local with the latest news across Australia and around the world including sport and weather.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. 3 contestants will go head to head against with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programme.title: 9News
programme.desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: The Events That Changed Australia
programme.desc: The Bali bombings and the Lindt Cafe siege marked the arrival of terror in Australia. While 9/11 felt distant, these events shattered the nation's sense of security and exposed a country hopelessly unprepared for change.

programme.title: Outback Murder Highway
programme.desc: One of Australia's most notorious murder hotspots. This stretch of road holds a deadly reputation. Experts reinvestigate these cases, unearthing new angles in the cold case crimes.

programme.title: Killer Interviews with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Morgan interviews Levi King to determine if it was nature or nurture that led to a 24-hour killing spree that cost the lives of five innocent people.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of the day's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Freddy and the Eighth
programme.desc: Join NRL Legend Brad Fittler, Danika Mason and NRL Immortal Andrew Johns for a unique look at all the biggest talking points of the week throughout the 2026 season.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman. Four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Space Invaders
programme.desc: Belinda's clutter is causing conflict with her family and has turned their home into a minefield for injured husband James. As Peter battles to restore harmony, Cherie takes on a retro-inspired renovation.

programme.title: Taronga: Who's Who in the Zoo
programme.desc: After a 16-month gestation, Kufara the 13-year-old Black Rhino has gone into labour with her second calf.

programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman. Four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: NRL Thursday Night Footy
programme.desc: Wide World of Sports presents Thursday Night footy with Tigers v Raiders, live from Leichhardt Oval. Join our expert commentary team for all the action, analysis and post match interviews. Kick off at 7:52PM AEST.

programme.title: NRL Thursday Night Footy Post
programme.desc: Join the Wide World of Sports team for all the post-match NRL news and analysis.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of the day's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The Night Caller
programme.desc: Following the hit and run, Tony cleans the car and realises it's damaged. Rob helps him meet with a mechanic to get it fixed. Tony weighs up the ethics of his situation on the radio.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.title: Reel Destinations
programme.desc: Join Dyllon Schulz and the Reel Destinations crew on an epic fishing adventure as they catch and cook their way around Queensland.

programme.title: Sister Dating Swap
programme.desc: When sisters Helena and Rachel are fed up with their love and work life, they agree to swap homes for 2 weeks to take a break.
